content: Active YouTube PEM interview prep as of April 2026. Role: Product Excellence Manager, Age Appropriateness team. Pack file: kb/career/packs/youtube_pem_2026.md. Story priority order: B1 Meta calibration story (lead behavioral, shows cross-platform credibility and systems design), B2 YouTube 2018 CSAM enforcement (origin story — full-circle return), B3 TikTok policy translation at scale, B4 Google Play age-gating research, B5 Anthropic AI safety ops (technical credibility). Company context: Neal Mohan 2026 priorities include responsible AI and creator safety. Shorts at 200B daily views — scale stakes are real. $20M Google.org youth safety initiative signals executive attention. Aman's unique positioning: has operated this problem from every angle — YouTube enforcer in 2018, cross-platform calibration builder, AI safety operator. The 'full-circle' narrative lives only in the YouTube pack, not in the universal base layer (anti-contamination rule).
outcome: Pack built. Universal base anti-contamination verified. Next: practice live responses using InterviewIntel module.
